en:
Remarks. —The undressing together now takes place in the narrow space of the dressing-room at the baths. The want of dress on the ship gives occasion to a further variant. (The old shirt torn in three.) In consequence of great uncertainty the getting up on the teacher is not mentioned. Instead, the two girls get up on two fat men. As "fat" becomes so prominent it should be noted that the teacher is more than a little plump. The setting is thoroughly typical; each one has a teacher. The duplication or multiplication of the persons is an expression of their significance, i.e. of the stored-up libido. [163] (Compare the duplication of the attribute in dementia præcox in my "Psychology of Dementia Præcox.") In cults and mythologies the significance of this duplication is very striking. (Cp. the Trinity and the two mystical formulas of confession: "Isis una quæ es omnia. Hermes omnia solus et ter unus.") Proverbially we say he eats, drinks, or sleeps "for two." The multiplication of the personality expresses also an analogy or comparison— my friend has the same "ætiological value" (Freud) as myself . In dementia præcox, or schizophrenia, to use Bleuler's wider and better term, the multiplication of the personality is mainly the expression of the stored-up libido, for it is invariably the person to whom the patient has transference who is subjected to this multiplication. ("There are two professors N." "Oh, you are also Dr. J.; this morning another came to see me who called himself Dr. J.") It seems that, corresponding to the general tendency in schizophrenia, this splitting is an analytic degradation whose motive is to prevent the arousing of too violent impressions. A final significance of the multiplication of personality which, however, does not come exactly under this concept is the raising of some attribute of the person to a living figure. A simple instance is Dionysos and his companion Phales, wherein Phales is the equivalent of Phallos, the personification of the penis of Dionysos. The so-called attendants of Dionysos (Satyri, Sileni, Mænades, Mimallones, etc.) consist of the personification of the attributes of Dionysos.

The scene in Andermatt is portrayed with a nice wit, or more properly speaking, dreamt further: "The teacher steals chestnuts," that is equivalent to saying he does what is prohibited. By chestnuts is meant roasted chestnuts, which on account of the incision are known as a female sexual symbol. Thus the remark of the teacher, that he was especially glad to travel with his pupils, following directly upon the theft of the chestnuts, becomes intelligible. This theft of the chestnuts is certainly a personal interpolation, for it does not occur in any of the other accounts. It shows how intensive was the inner participation of the school companions of Marie X. in the dream, resting upon similar ætiological requirements.

This is the last of the aural witnesses. The story of the veil, the pain in the feet, are items which we may perhaps suspect to have been suggested in the original narrative. Other interpolations are, however, absolutely personal, and are due to independent inner participation in the meaning of the dream.

Hearsay Evidence.
zh:
備註。—— 現在，共同脫衣發生在浴場更衣室的狹小空間裡。船上缺少衣物則提供了進一步的變體。（舊襯衫被撕成三片。）由於極大的不確定性，爬上老師的舉動未被提及。取而代之的是，兩個女孩爬上兩個胖男人。由於「胖」變得如此突出，應注意老師本人也頗為豐腴。這個場景極具典型性；每個人都有自己的老師。人物的重複或倍增，是對其重要性——亦即積聚的力比多——的一種表達。[163]（比較我在《早發性痴呆的心理學》一書中關於早發性痴呆中屬性重複的論述。）在崇拜與神話中，這種重複的意義非常顯著。（比較三位一體，以及兩個神秘的認信公式：「伊西斯，獨一無二，妳就是萬有。赫爾墨斯，獨自即萬有，且是三重獨一。」）俗語中，我們說一個人吃、喝或睡「頂兩個人」。人格的倍增也表達了一種類比或比較——我的朋友與我本人具有相同的「病因學價值」（佛洛伊德）。在早發性痴呆，或更廣泛且更恰當的術語——精神分裂症（布洛伊勒）中，人格的倍增主要是積聚力比多的表達，因為遭受這種倍增的，總是病人對之產生移情的那個人。（「有兩位 N 教授。」「哦，你也是 J 博士；今天早上另一位自稱 J 博士的人來看我。」）似乎，對應於精神分裂症的普遍傾向，這種分裂是一種分析性的退化，其動機是防止激起過於強烈的印象。人格倍增的另一個最終意義——儘管不完全符合此概念——是將某人的某個屬性提升為一個活生生的形象。一個簡單的例子是狄俄尼索斯與他的同伴法勒斯，其中法勒斯等於法洛斯，即狄俄尼索斯陰莖的擬人化。所謂的狄俄尼索斯隨從（薩提爾、西勒諾斯、邁那得斯、米馬洛涅斯等）即由狄俄尼索斯屬性的擬人化所構成。

安德馬特場景以一種巧妙的機智被描繪出來，或者更確切地說，被進一步夢下去：「老師偷栗子」，這等於說他做了禁止之事。此處的栗子指的是烤栗子，因其切口而被視為女性性象徵。因此，老師緊接著偷栗子之後所說的、他特別高興與學生們一起旅行的話語，就變得可以理解了。這個偷栗子的情節確實是個人的插入，因為它沒有出現在任何其他記述中。這顯示了瑪麗 X 的同學們在夢中的內在參與是多麼強烈，這種參與建立在相似的病因學需求之上。

這是最後一位聽覺證人。面紗的故事、腳痛的情節，或許是我們可以懷疑在原初敘述中已被暗示的項目。然而，其他的插入則完全是個人性的，並且源於對夢之意義的獨立內在參與。

傳聞證據。

---
